---
title: "Scenes and Characters, or, Eighteen Months at Beechcroft. By the author of “Abbey Church, or, Self Control and Self Conceit.”"
---

## Scenes and Characters, or, Eighteen Months at Beechcroft. By the author of “Abbey Church, or, Self Control and Self Conceit.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1847
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** James Burns, Portman Street; London; Henry Mozley and Sons, Derby.

### Notes

The Mohun family appear in the later novels <i>Beechcroft at Rockstone </i>and <i>The Two Sides of the Shield.</i>

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
